title: Springy Spicy Egyptian Basil Tagine
description: A vegan-friendly Egyptian dish featuring basil and a blend of spices, cooked in a bain-marie to create a flavorful and aromatic tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the ground cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fresh basil and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Prepare a bain-marie by placing a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water.
Carefully place the saucepan with the tagine mixture into the bain-marie.
Simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional fresh basil if desired.
